name: Pun-chee
description: Pun-chee is a Bandit Seraph roid shield from the Campaign of Carnage DLC. Compared with a similar purple roid shield using the same components, it generally performs better and is a good fit for builds that rely on frequent melee attacks. Its shorter recharge delay can make it harder to keep the shield empty, which can lower roid uptime and reduce peak melee damage compared with some other named roid shields.
notes: It can spawn with a Maliwan capacitor for elemental damage resistance or a Torgue capacitor for explosive resistance. These Seraph versions do not use the standard resistance prefixes (such as Grounded, Inflammable, Alkaline, or Blast-proof).
abilities: When depleted, melee attacks deal bonus Roid Damage.
